summary: Implemented visible Home task route-back for tasks promoted from Write notes by classifying source-note availability, showing View source note for available origins, handling missing sources gracefully, and routing through the existing Write note highlight/detail path.
recommended_next_reason: Stop before protocol promotion; protocol promotion should be its own slice because it touches Home protocol lifecycle and Today Continue projection.

contract_status_changes.contract: Legacy handoff schema backfill for home-task-write-origin-route-back
contract_status_changes.before: Legacy handoff predated explicit proof, residual risk, repo cleanliness, and mirror status fields.
contract_status_changes.after: Backfilled only from the existing handoff summary, validation trail, and recorded risks; product history and proof claims were not upgraded beyond the evidence.

residual_risks: Route-back is implemented through app wiring and domain-tested source availability classification, but there is no screenshot/UI regression proof for the Home task detail affordance.
Write to protocol remains explicitly future work and was not touched.
